title: crotalaria lisowskii
intro: Crotalaria lisowskii, also known as the Lisowski bush, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, and its medicinal properties have been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria lisowskii is typically dried and used as a tea or powder to extract its medicinal properties.
